{"recipes":[{"id":"seed-fajita-nachos","name":"Fajita Steak Loaded Sweet Potato Nachos","cal":600,"prot":45,"carb":45,"fat":22,"ingredients":"2 rump steaks
4 sweet potatoes
1.5 tbsp fajita seasoning
1 tbsp chicken seasoning
20g reduced-fat cheddar
20g grated mozzarella
1 onion
1 bell pepper
8 tomatoes
1/4 red onion
4 tbsp guacamole
4 tbsp light crème fraîche
Honey (drizzle)
Chilli flakes + fresh parsley","instructions":"1. Cut sweet potatoes into circles, toss with oil + seasoning, bake 35 min at 190°C (375°F).
2. Slice onion + pepper; caramelize in oiled pan with half the fajita seasoning, ~20 min.
3. Season steak (salt, pepper, remaining seasoning), cook to preference, rest 10 min.
4. Chop tomatoes + red onion; mix with olive oil and lime juice.
5. Add cheese to the baked sweet potatoes, bake 10 more min until golden.
6. Layer potatoes with onion/pepper, sliced steak, salsa, guac, crème fraîche, honey, chilli flakes, parsley.","notes":"Serves 4 — macros are PER SERVING, estimated by Claude (post gave none). Source: https://www.instagram.com/p/DZLFKtEqMeV/"},{"id":"seed-cut-day-plan","name":"Cutting Day Meal Plan (full day)","cal":3128,"prot":200,"carb":380,"fat":90,"ingredients":"Salted maple latte
150g medjool dates
Eggs
Ground venison
Sweet potatoes
Cottage cheese
Orange juice
Ground beef
Tzatziki (greek yogurt, cucumber, garlic)
Raw milk
Maple syrup","instructions":"Breakfast: salted maple latte + 70g medjool dates.
Lunch: egg + venison scramble, sweet potato with cottage cheese.
Pre-workout: 80g medjool dates + orange juice.
Dinner: ground beef + sweet potato + homemade tzatziki.
Dessert: raw milk + maple syrup.","notes":"Macros are for the WHOLE DAY as posted: 3128 cal | 200g P | 380g C | 90g F. Log individual meals at a fraction of a serving. Source: https://www.instagram.com/p/DavIt7sT6wZ/"},{"id":"seed-sp-bowls","name":"Loaded Sweet Potato Bowls","cal":550,"prot":35,"carb":55,"fat":18,"ingredients":"Sweet potatoes
Protein of choice (chicken / ground beef)
Toppings of choice (cheese, greek yogurt, salsa, greens)","instructions":"1. Halve sweet potatoes, oil lightly, bake FACE DOWN until caramelized (~35-40 min at 400°F).
2. Cook your protein while they bake.
3. Load the potatoes with protein + toppings.","notes":"ROUGH ESTIMATE — the post shared no ingredient amounts or macros; edit after you make it once.
